name: Baked Apple Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Core and slice apples into 1/2-inch rings. Place in a shallow baking dish.
3. In a saucepan, combine the remaining ingredients and heat until warm.
4. Pour the mixture over the apple rings and bake for 15 minutes or until tender, turning to baste once or twice.
5. Variation: Very good with red-hot candies placed in the center of each ring.
